curation_notes: Patch commit f224c05 from PR #962 fixes XSS in timesheet descriptions. The fix has two parts: (1) in src/Twig/MarkdownExtension.php, the markdownToHtml function's call to toHtml() changes the second parameter from true to false, disabling raw HTML pass-through in Markdown rendering; (2) in 6 Twig templates, an |escape filter is added before |desc2html when rendering entry.description. All 7 files are marked as locations since they each independently contribute to the vulnerability. Marked as noisy because 7 non-test source files were changed. Vulnerability class xss confirmed — matches CWE-79 and the patch clearly addresses unsanitized HTML output.
